creator: danilo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

okay, no problem. You can fallow these steps:

# cd /usr/ports/archivers/xarchiver
# rm files/patch-src_tar.c
# pkg install gtar (or cd /usr/ports/archivers/gtar ; make install ; cd -)
# make clean
# make reinstall

and try to extract your bz2 file again.

After that, please, let me know what happened :)

Thank you!
